value.found_quote: To receive updates when a run succeeds, fails, or is canceled, create a webhook endpoint and subscribe to the `eval.run.succeeded`, `eval.run.failed`, and `eval.run.canceled` events. See the [webhooks guide](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/webhooks) for more details.
value.rationale: The page describes creating a webhook endpoint and subscribing to events, referencing a dedicated webhooks guide, substantiating that OpenAI offers webhook endpoints. No deprecation is noted for the webhooks feature itself.
